case_title: HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. JOSHLYN SAMOAN NORMAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSEPH A. QUARTELL, COLELCTION SERVICES MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: 51.05) SERVED DEC-01-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, JOSHLYN SAMOAN
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMAION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, JOSHLYN SAMOAN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, JOSHLYN SAMOAN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $272.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, JOSHLYN SAMOAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF CCSF, REPRESETNED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL, COLLECTION SERVICES MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSHLYN SAMOAN NORMAN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORMAN, JOSHLYN SAMOAN $2,272.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,323.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $84.65 ACCRUED INTEREST, $85.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
